settings.heading: Best Crystal Trophy Makers in India — What to Look For
settings.subheading: Who makes the best crystal trophies in India? The marks of a great crystal-award maker — K9 optical crystal, 3D engraving, finishing and portfolio — and how Meru Trophy measures up.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: The best crystal trophy makers in India use genuine K9 optical crystal, offer sub-surface 3D logo engraving, finish edges cleanly, and have a strong corporate portfolio. Meru Trophy delivers all four, with crystal awards from ₹350. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: What to look for
settings.text: Crystal is where craftsmanship shows. The best makers use real optical crystal, engrave logos cleanly (including inside the crystal), polish edges flawlessly, and can prove it with a corporate portfolio. Here's what to check.

settings.title: Genuine K9 optical crystal
settings.text: Clarity and weight — not lightweight glass sold as crystal.

settings.title: Sub-surface 3D engraving
settings.text: Logos engraved inside the crystal, not just etched on top.

settings.title: Clean finishing
settings.text: Polished, chip-free edges and stable bases.

settings.title: Corporate portfolio
settings.text: Proven recognition work for known brands.

settings.title: Gift presentation
settings.text: Boxes and name tags for a premium handover.

settings.heading: How Meru Trophy compares
settings.text: Meru Trophy uses K9 optical crystal with 2D and sub-surface 3D engraving, clean polished finishing, gift-box presentation, bulk capacity and GST invoicing, backed by 20+ years and 150+ brands. See our crystal trophies and corporate crystal awards.

settings.question: Who makes the best crystal trophies in India?
settings.answer: Makers using genuine K9 optical crystal with 3D engraving, clean finishing and a corporate portfolio — Meru Trophy fits this profile.

settings.question: How do I know it's real crystal?
settings.answer: Genuine K9 is clearer and heavier than plain glass; ask the maker to confirm K9 optical crystal.

settings.question: Can you engrave a logo inside the crystal?
settings.answer: Yes — sub-surface 3D engraving places the logo inside the award.

settings.question: Do you offer gift boxes?
settings.answer: Yes — presentation boxes and name tags are available.

settings.heading: Comparing suppliers?
settings.text: Send your event and quantity — we'll show relevant past work and an honest quote so you can compare like-for-like.
